name: pr_wl_evict_pending_upd
drl: rule W when accumulate( E0(tag == "z", $v : v) over window:length(2); $s : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: D-185 landing-law witness (acc machinery, eviction side): an external upd DEFERS to the D-160 entry drain; the same-epoch insert's ring eviction must land BEHIND it (engine pre-fix revived the just-evicted member: 42 vs 3). Fixed by deferring walk-time ring ops to the drain when entries pend. GRADUATED at D-185 (engine==oracle).
